commands_executed:
python3 - <<'PY'
import pathlib, re
f=pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab')
lines=f.read_text().splitlines()
out=[]
for line in lines:
    if not line.strip() or line.lstrip().startswith('#'):
        out.append(line)
        continue
    parts=re.split(r'\s+', line, maxsplit=5)
    if len(parts)<6:
        out.append(line)
        continue
    if parts[1]=='/boot':
        opts=parts[3]
        if 'nodev' not in opts.split(','):
            if opts=='defaults':
                opts='defaults,nodev'
            else:
                opts=opts+','+'nodev'
            parts[3]=opts
    out.append(' '.join(parts))
f.write_text('\n'.join(out)+'\n')
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import pathlib, re
fstab=pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab')
lines=fstab.read_text().splitlines()
new_lines=[]
for line in lines:
    stripped=line.strip()
    if not stripped or stripped.startswith('#'):
        new_lines.append(line)
        continue
    # split by spaces/tabs but keep the original field positions
    parts=re.split(r'\s+', line, maxsplit=5)
    if len(parts)<6:
        new_lines.append(line)
        continue
    if parts[1] == '/boot':
        opts=parts[3]
        # ensure nodev present
        opts_set=set(opts.split(','))
        if 'nodev' not in opts_set:
            opts_set.add('nodev')
            parts[3]=','.join(sorted(opts_set))
    new_lines.append(' '.join(parts))
print('\n'.join(new_lines))
fstab.write_text('\n'.join(new_lines)+'\n')
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import pathlib, re

backup = pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab.bak')
fstab = pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab')

data = backup.read_text().splitlines()
new = []
for line in data:
    stripped = line.strip()
    if not stripped or stripped.startswith('#'):
        new.append(line)
        continue
    parts = re.split(r'\s+', line, maxsplit=5)
    if len(parts) < 6:
        new.append(line)
        continue
    if parts[1] == '/boot':
        opts = parts[3]
        opts_set = set(filter(None, opts.split(',')))
        opts_set.add('nodev')
        parts[3] = ','.join(sorted(opts_set))
    new.append(' '.join(parts))

fstab.write_text('\n'.join(new)+'\n')
print('Updated fstab')
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import re
import pathlib

backup=pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab.bak')
content=backup.read_text().splitlines()
new=[]
for line in content:
    if re.search(r'\s+/boot\s+', line) and not line.lstrip().startswith('#'):
        # modify
        parts=re.split(r'\s+', line, maxsplit=5)
        # parts like [device, mount, filetyp, options, dump, pass]
        if len(parts)>=6:
            opts=parts[3]
            if 'nodev' not in opts.split(','):
                opts_set=set(opts.split(','))
                opts_set.add('nodev')
                parts[3]=','.join(sorted(opts_set))
        new_line=' '.join(parts)
        new.append(new_line)
        continue
    new.append(line)

new_file='\n'.join(new)+'\n'
with open('/etc/fstab', 'w') as f:
    f.write(new_file)
print('Updated fstab')
PY

import pathlib, re
f=pathlib.Path('/etc/fstab')
lines=f.read_text().splitlines()
out=[]
for line in lines:
    if not line.strip() or line.lstrip().startswith('#'):
        out.append(line)
        continue
    parts=re.split(r'\s+', line, maxsplit=5)
    if len(parts)<6:
        out.append(line)
        continue
    if parts[1]=='/boot':
        opts=parts[3]
        if 'nodev' not in opts.split(','):
            if opts=='defaults':
                opts='defaults,nodev'
            else:
                opts=opts+','+'nodev'
            parts[3]=opts
    out.append(' '.join(parts))
f.write_text('\n'.join(out)+'\n')

new_file='\n'.join(new)+'\n'
